description: buildApiUrl percent-encodes the path segment; buildProxyUrl and buildCdnUrl do not.

findings.rationale: buildApiUrl is structurally identical to buildProxyUrl and buildCdnUrl (template literal, two params, one return) except it wraps the path in encodeURIComponent. The encoding is load-bearing: without it, paths containing spaces, slashes, or percent signs corrupt the URL, causing routing failures and potential path-traversal issues. An agent that normalises the three onto a shared helper will drop the encode call unless warned.

tier_note: Requires structural+data-flow detector; beyond regex detector scope.
